playerActivity.noMatches: No matches were observed for this selection.
playerActivity.discoveryDescription: Each completed hour is discovered once per queue. Casual queues store match IDs and counts only; ranked Siege continues through the full statistics and recovery pipeline.
tierLists.title: Champion Tier Lists
tierLists.description: Create, share, and discuss complete or focused champion rankings with the community.
tierLists.empty: No tier lists have been shared yet.
tierLists.name: Tier-list name
tierLists.notesPlaceholder: Explain the patch, queue, or reasoning behind your ranking.
tierLists.trayHelp: Drag champions into an S–F row. On touch devices, use the selector on each champion.
tierLists.partialHint: Unplaced champions can remain in the tray when you publish.
tierLists.updateError: Failed to update the tier list.
tierLists.editForbidden: Only the tier-list owner or an administrator can edit this list.
tierLists.loginRequired: Log in to publish a tier list.
tierLists.loadError: Champion data is unavailable, so the tier-list editor cannot load safely.
tierLists.placementRequired: Place at least one champion before publishing.
tierLists.socialHint: Likes and comments use the same Community account and moderation system.
